title: What fees matter when choosing an ETF?
question_body: Community question about what fees matter when choosing an etf?
answer_body: A 0.5% vs 0.05% expense ratio compounds into a large gap over decades.

title: What fees matter when choosing an ETF?
question_body: Community question about what fees matter when choosing an etf?
answer_body: Expense ratio first, then bid-ask spread, tracking error and any platform commission.

title: Should I pay off credit card debt before investing?
question_body: Community question about should i pay off credit card debt before investing?
answer_body: Compare the card APR with your expected after-tax return. Above roughly 8-10% APR, paying the debt almost always wins.

title: Should I invest in ETFs or individual stocks?
question_body: Community question about should i invest in etfs or individual stocks?
answer_body: A core ETF portfolio plus a small satellite of stocks is a common compromise.

title: Is it better to rent or buy a house?
question_body: Community question about is it better to rent or buy a house?
answer_body: Compare unrecoverable costs: rent vs mortgage interest, taxes, insurance, maintenance and transaction costs. Buying is not automatically better.
combined_text: Is it better to rent or buy a house? Community question about is it better to rent or buy a house? Compare unrecoverable costs: rent vs mortgage interest, taxes, insurance, maintenance and transaction costs. Buying is not automatically better. mortgage rent buy housing

title: Should I invest in ETFs or individual stocks?
question_body: Community question about should i invest in etfs or individual stocks?
answer_body: For most investors, diversified low-cost ETFs cut idiosyncratic risk and need less monitoring than single stocks.

title: What should I do if I think an investment is a scam?
question_body: Community question about what should i do if i think an investment is a scam?
answer_body: Stop sending money, preserve all records, verify registration with the regulator, and report the suspected fraud.

title: How can I improve my credit score?
question_body: Community question about how can i improve my credit score?
answer_body: Pay on time, keep utilisation low, avoid unnecessary applications and check your reports for errors.

title: When should I prioritise retirement contributions?
question_body: Community question about when should i prioritise retirement contributions?
answer_body: After high-interest debt and a starter emergency fund, capture the full employer match before anything else.

title: Do I need a financial advisor?
question_body: Community question about do i need a financial advisor?
answer_body: A fee-only fiduciary helps with complex tax, estate or retirement planning; simple investing may only need a low-cost index fund.
